objective: Review the plan for adding mostConnectedNode pure helper and extending carto stats to print the most-connected node title
key_changes: Plan correctly targets graph.ts (pure helper), cli.ts (output line), and graph.test.ts (4 unit tests)
No data model or persistence changes — additive, non-breaking extension
Tie-breaking should use graph.nodes array order (more deterministic than edge-iteration order)
Dangling edge reference handling not specified — recommend graceful skip
No security concerns — pure computation, no I/O side effects added
